user.title: Add Aigostar Bulbs
user.description:
Enter your AigoSmart account credentials.

All bulbs linked to your account will be discovered automatically.
Token refresh is handled automatically.

verify.title: Email Verification
verify.description:
A verification code has been sent to your email.
Please enter the code below.

error.cannot_connect: Login failed. Check email and password.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check Home Assistant logs.

sync_devices.name: Sync devices
sync_devices.description: Re-discover all devices from Aigostar cloud and add new ones.
